author: lOrm
content: Fixed in src/tools/file/read.rs. Added MAX_FILE_SIZE_BYTES=10MiB. Pre-flight fs::metadata() rejects oversize files; Unix FileTypeExt blocks char/block devices, FIFOs, sockets. All reads wrapped in Read::take(MAX_FILE_SIZE_BYTES) for defense-in-depth against len()==0 special files. Same guards on read_image_file and read_notebook_file. 7 regression tests added (all pass): read_text_oversize_file_is_rejected_with_actionable_error, read_text_small_file_reads_cleanly, read_text_empty_file_is_ok, read_image_oversize_file_is_rejected, read_image_small_file_reads_cleanly, read_text_char_device_is_rejected.
